body_transformation: The shell transforms into a cracked obsidian plate with jagged black edges, its beige and brown accents replaced by deep charcoal etching. The light blue body shifts to a matte charcoal gray, while the pale underbelly becomes a shadow violet hue. Short stubby legs gain a subtle tattered texture at the joints, resembling shadowy fur fringes. The curled tail tip now features shadowy translucency, glowing faintly with obsidian silver streaks.
signature_feature: Shell: cracked obsidian plate with charcoal etching and obsidian silver streaks.
